name: example-urban-jungle
title: Urban Jungle — Scroll Video Hero

title_i18n.zh-CN: Urban Jungle — 滚动视频英雄页

description: Cinematic scroll-driven hero: a fixed full-screen video that scrubs frame-by-frame with scroll, an oversized display headline that floats away, a frosted-glass About panel sliding up from below, a GSAP liquid-fill pill nav, and a text-logo marquee.

description_i18n.zh-CN: 电影感滚动英雄页：随滚动逐帧擦除的全屏视频、超大展示字体标题随滚动飘散、从底部滑入的毛玻璃 About 面板、GSAP 液态填充胶囊导航与文字 logo 跑马灯。
description_i18n.en: Cinematic scroll-driven hero: a fixed full-screen video that scrubs frame-by-frame with scroll, an oversized display headline that floats away, a frosted-glass About panel sliding up from below, a GSAP liquid-fill pill nav, and a text-logo marquee.

query.zh-CN: 构建 Urban Jungle 滚动视频英雄落地页（完整规格见 en 字段，以 en 为准）：500vh 容器、随滚动擦除的 Mux HLS 全屏视频、Dirtyline 展示字体标题随滚动飘散、从底部滑入的毛玻璃 About 面板、GSAP 液态填充胶囊导航与文字跑马灯。
